HomePage.title: Clarity for the choices that shape your life
HomePage.description: Personal astrology consultations, accurate birth-chart insights and guided learning—available in English, Hindi and Gujarati.
HomePage.heroCard: Traditional insight. Thoughtful guidance. Your choices remain yours.

value.title: Insight that helps you move forward

personal.title: Personal to your chart
personal.description: Every consultation begins with your details, questions and current life context.

practical.title: Clear and practical
practical.description: Complex chart patterns are translated into grounded guidance you can actually use.

accessible.title: Built around you
accessible.description: Choose your language, currency and consultation focus without unnecessary friction.

services.title: Start with the guidance you need
services.description: Choose a focused consultation with clear duration and pricing. Your astrologer will tailor the conversation to your questions.

astrologers.title: Experienced, thoughtful astrologers
astrologers.description: Meet practitioners who combine classical knowledge with calm, respectful communication.

testimonials.title: Guidance that feels clear and human

insights.title: Latest insights
insights.description: Practical articles that help you understand your chart and prepare for a useful consultation.

closing.title: Ready to begin with a clearer question?
closing.description: Explore a consultation that matches what you want to understand right now.

AstrologersPage.metaDescription: Meet our experienced Vedic astrologers and find the right guide for your questions.
AstrologersPage.title: Choose a guide who understands your questions
AstrologersPage.description: Explore each astrologer's approach, specialties, languages and consultations before you book.

AstrologerProfile.servicesDescription: Choose a focused consultation with {name}. You can confirm your service and preferred time in the next step.
AstrologerProfile.noServices: No consultations are currently available for this astrologer.

BirthChart.metaDescription: Create a Vedic or Western birth chart with region-aware chart style recommendations.
BirthChart.title: See the sky at the moment you were born
BirthChart.description: Enter accurate birth details, review the recommended astrology system, and generate your chart with planetary positions and houses.
BirthChart.name: Full name
BirthChart.placeHelp: Choose a precise city and country. The calculation service resolves its coordinates and historical timezone.
BirthChart.recommendationDescription: Until the calculation API resolves your place, Vedic with a North Indian chart is shown as a preview. The first calculation leaves system and style unset so the API can supply the regional recommendation.
BirthChart.overrideNotice: You have chosen an override instead of the regional recommendation.
BirthChart.privacy: Your birth details are sent only to the configured calculation API and are not saved unless you explicitly choose to save.
BirthChart.demoNotice: The calculation engine is not available yet, so this is a clearly marked sample preview—not an astrological calculation.
BirthChart.detailsError: Please check the birth details and choose a recognized place before trying again.
BirthChart.dataPending: This detail will appear when supplied by the calculation engine.
BirthChart.nextStepsDescription: Signed-in clients can save calculated charts. Attaching a saved chart to a consultation will be available within the dedicated booking flow.
BirthChart.signInRequired: Sign in is required to save a chart to your account.
BirthChart.saveError: The chart could not be saved. Please try again.
BirthChart.demoActionsDisabled: Saving is disabled for sample preview data.
BirthChart.emptyDescription: Complete the form to render an SVG chart, planetary positions, houses, resolved timezone and the API's recommendation.

Booking.metaDescription: Choose an astrologer, consultation service and available time, then submit your booking for manual UPI payment.
Booking.title: Choose the guidance and time that work for you
Booking.description: Select your astrologer, service and an open slot. Your request is held as pending payment until the practice confirms your UPI payment.
Booking.chooseAstrologerDescription: Compare specialties and choose the practitioner you want to meet.
Booking.slotTimezone: Times are shown in your device's local timezone.
Booking.yourDetails: Tell us how to reach you
Booking.noServices: No active services are available for this astrologer.
Booking.noSlots: No open slots were found in the next two weeks. Please try another service or astrologer.
Booking.demoAvailability: These sample times are for preview only because demo astrologer data is being shown.
Booking.availabilityError: Availability could not be loaded. Please try again shortly.
Booking.name: Full name
Booking.includeBirthDetailsHelp: Optional—share these details so the astrologer can prepare.
Booking.privacy: Your contact and optional birth details are sent to the booking API for this consultation request.
Booking.bookingError: Your booking was not created. The slot has not been held; please try again.
Booking.confirmationDescription: Your request was created. Complete the UPI payment and quote the reference below so the practice can confirm it.
Booking.demoConfirmationDescription: No booking was created and no slot was held. This confirmation previews the complete flow while demo data is active—do not send payment.
Booking.paymentDescription: Pay the displayed amount and include {reference} in your note or message.
Booking.paymentUnavailable: UPI instructions are not configured yet. The practice will contact you with payment details.
Booking.nextStepPay: Complete the UPI payment using the ID or QR above.
Booking.demoNextStep: Choose a real astrologer or return after the booking API is connected to hold a slot.
Booking.nextStepReview: The practice manually checks the payment against your reference number.
Booking.nextStepConfirmed: You receive confirmation and meeting details after verification.

Metadata.title: Astrology Platform
Metadata.description: Astrology consultations, birth charts and courses.

CoursesPage.metaDescription: Explore recorded and live astrology courses with expert instructors and INR or USD pricing.
CoursesPage.title: Courses for thoughtful, practical chart reading
CoursesPage.description: Choose a self-paced recorded course or learn with an instructor in a live cohort.
CoursesPage.empty: No courses match this filter yet.

CourseDetail.curriculumPending: The detailed curriculum will be published shortly.
CourseDetail.localTimezone: Times are shown in your device's local timezone.
CourseDetail.schedulePending: The next cohort schedule will be announced shortly.
CourseDetail.noReviews: This course has no published reviews yet.

CourseEnrollment.title: Reserve your course place
CourseEnrollment.description: Submit your details. Access is activated after the practice manually confirms your UPI payment.
CourseEnrollment.name: Full name
CourseEnrollment.privacy: Your details are sent securely to the enrollment API for this request.
CourseEnrollment.error: Your enrollment was not created. Please try again.
CourseEnrollment.confirmationDescription: Pay by UPI and quote the reference below. Course access starts after manual verification.
CourseEnrollment.demoDescription: No enrollment was created. This previews the flow while demo data is active—do not send payment.
CourseEnrollment.paymentDescription: Include {reference} in your payment note or message.
CourseEnrollment.paymentUnavailable: UPI instructions are not configured yet. The practice will contact you.
CourseEnrollment.nextPay: Complete the UPI payment using the ID or QR above.
CourseEnrollment.demoNext: Choose a live course record to create a real enrollment.
CourseEnrollment.nextReview: The practice manually verifies payment against your reference.
CourseEnrollment.nextAccess: Confirmed learners receive recorded access or the live class schedule.

Account.metaDescription: Access your astrology courses, consultations and saved birth charts.
Account.title: Your learning and consultations in one place
Account.description: Sign in to access confirmed lessons and live classes, review bookings and see saved birth charts.
Account.loadError: Your account data could not be loaded. Your session is still active.
Account.optionalAccount: An account is optional. You can still book consultations and enroll as a guest.
Account.name: Full name
Account.authError: We could not access your account. Please try again.
Account.accessPending: Course access unlocks after the practice confirms your payment.
Account.deviceProgress: Progress is saved on this device until server-side syncing is available.

empty.coursesBody: Explore recorded and live courses, then return here after enrolling.
empty.bookingsBody: Choose an astrologer, service and available time when you are ready.
empty.chartsBody: Calculate a chart and save it to this account for future consultations.

Blog.metaDescription: Read practical articles about Vedic astrology, birth charts and preparing for consultations.
Blog.title: Insights for a clearer conversation
Blog.description: Approachable articles about charts, traditions and making thoughtful use of an astrology consultation.
Blog.empty: No articles have been published yet.
Blog.disclaimer: Astrology content is offered for reflection and education. It is not medical, legal, financial or emergency advice.

Footer.description: Personal astrology guidance, practical learning and trusted consultations.

LegalNotice.label: Placeholder policy.
LegalNotice.body: This is demonstration text. Final legal copy is pending client sign-off before production use.

Contact.metaDescription: Get in touch by form, WhatsApp, email or phone, and find us on the map.
Contact.formDescription: Fill in the form and we will get back to you. Please do not share sensitive birth details here.
Contact.formUnavailable: Email enquiries are not configured yet. Please use the contact details or WhatsApp option on this page.
Contact.name: Your name
Contact.referenceHelp: If your enquiry is about an existing booking or course enrollment, add its reference number.
Contact.privacy: We use your details only to respond to your enquiry.
Contact.success: Thank you. Your email app should open with your message ready to send.
Contact.fallbackNote: Note: online message delivery is not connected yet, so this opens your email app addressed to us. You can also reach us on WhatsApp, email or phone.

errors.name: Please enter your name.
errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.message: Please enter a message of at least 10 characters.
